records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it... If only I had my full strength...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it... If only I had my full strength...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it... If only I had my full strength...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then these chumps wouldn't stand a chance...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then these chumps wouldn't stand a chance...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then these chumps wouldn't stand a chance...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, how about fighting me without those silver bullets or whatever?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, how about fighting me without those silver bullets or whatever?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, how about fighting me without those silver bullets or whatever?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd rather not go down like a hunted animal!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd rather not go down like a hunted animal!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd rather not go down like a hunted animal!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. Even in this situation, you remain composed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. Even in this situation, you remain composed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. Even in this situation, you remain composed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Composed, my foot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Composed, my foot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Composed, my foot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, I'm fighting for my life here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, I'm fighting for my life here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, I'm fighting for my life here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even in a weakened state, you're still this capable?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even in a weakened state, you're still this capable?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even in a weakened state, you're still this capable?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would be a waste for you to spend your days as a mere con artist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would be a waste for you to spend your days as a mere con artist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would be a waste for you to spend your days as a mere con artist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now I'm about to spend the rest of my life as a lab rat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now I'm about to spend the rest of my life as a lab rat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now I'm about to spend the rest of my life as a lab rat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You bastard...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You bastard...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You bastard...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not that it matters. Your so-called benefactor is just using you, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not that it matters. Your so-called benefactor is just using you, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not that it matters. Your so-called benefactor is just using you, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A guy who won't even tell you his name? Do you really think he'll have your back until the end?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A guy who won't even tell you his name? Do you really think he'll have your back until the end?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A guy who won't even tell you his name? Do you really think he'll have your back until the end?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The moment your research is complete, he's going to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The moment your research is complete, he's going to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The moment your research is complete, he's going to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Argh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Argh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Argh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...If you were trying to provoke me, congratulations. It worked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...If you were trying to provoke me, congratulations. It worked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...If you were trying to provoke me, congratulations. It worked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you really should be more careful who you pick fights with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you really should be more careful who you pick fights with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you really should be more careful who you pick fights with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-damn it... That hurts...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-damn it... That hurts...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-damn it... That hurts...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: High-grade Counters don't often feel pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: High-grade Counters don't often feel pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: High-grade Counters don't often feel pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Consider this a rare and valuable experience.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Consider this a rare and valuable experience.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Consider this a rare and valuable experience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shot your knee. Running away will be quite difficult now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shot your knee. Running away will be quite difficult now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shot your knee. Running away will be quite difficult now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Restrain this test subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Restrain this test subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Restrain this test subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remove her eyes, ears, and tongue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remove her eyes, ears, and tongue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remove her eyes, ears, and tongue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They'll regenerate eventually, so it doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They'll regenerate eventually, so it doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They'll regenerate eventually, so it doesn't matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Every time I regenerate, I'll make sure to piss you off as much as possible
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Every time I regenerate, I'll make sure to piss you off as much as possible
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Every time I regenerate, I'll make sure to piss you off as much as possible
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've already healed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've already healed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've already healed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You continue to exceed my expectations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You continue to exceed my expectations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You continue to exceed my expectations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To launch a counterattack this soon, even without catching me off guard...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To launch a counterattack this soon, even without catching me off guard...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To launch a counterattack this soon, even without catching me off guard...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I had a way to do that, your head would've been gone already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I had a way to do that, your head would've been gone already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I had a way to do that, your head would've been gone already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the heck is this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the heck is this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the heck is this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-Katharina...? You're alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-Katharina...? You're alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-Katharina...? You're alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Something's off about her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Something's off about her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Something's off about her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Slurp*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Slurp*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Slurp*
